stickers.svgCode:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 400 400" width="400" height="400">
  <style>
    .robot {
      transform-origin: 190px 200px;
      animation: bounce 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.8, 0, 0.2, 1) infinite alternate;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .robot:hover {
      animation: crazyShake 0.15s infinite;
    }
    .flame {
      transform-origin: 160px 340px;
      animation: burn 0.15s infinite alternate;
    }
    .wink {
      transform-origin: 187.5px 197.5px;
      animation: wink 2.5s infinite;
    }
    .flicker {
      animation: flicker 2s infinite;
    }
    .fast-flicker {
      animation: flicker 0.5s infinite alternate;
    }
    .pulse-halo {
      transform-origin: 190px 200px;
      animation: wave 1.5s cubic-bezier(0, 0.5, 0.5, 1) infinite;
      fill: none;
      stroke: #a771ea;
    }
    .pulse-halo:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.75s; }
    .hand {
      transform-origin: center;
      animation: spinHand 2s linear infinite;
    }
    .hand-l { transform-origin: 45px 215px; animation-direction: reverse; }
    .hand-r { transform-origin: 350px 180px; }
    .bit {
      transform-origin: center;
      animation: pop 0.8s infinite alternate;
    }

    @keyframes bounce {
      0% { transform: translateY(12px); }
      100% { transform: translateY(-18px); }
    }
    @keyframes burn {
      0% { transform: scaleY(0.7); opacity: 0.8; }
      100% { transform: scaleY(1.4); opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes wink {
      0%, 65%, 85%, 100% { transform: scaleY(1); }
      75% { transform: scaleY(0); }
    }
    @keyframes flicker {
      0%, 88%, 92%, 96%, 100% { opacity: 1; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px #a771ea); }
      90%, 94% { opacity: 0.4; filter: none; }
    }
    @keyframes crazyShake {
      0%, 100% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0); }
      25% { transform: translate(6px, -6px) rotate(4deg); }
      50% { transform: translate(-6px, 6px) rotate(-4deg); }
      75% { transform: translate(6px, 6px) rotate(2deg); }
    }
    @keyframes wave {
      0% { transform: scale(0.4); opacity: 0.9; stroke-width: 2; }
      100% { transform: scale(1.6); opacity: 0; stroke-width: 18; }
    }
    @keyframes spinHand {
      0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
    }
    @keyframes pop {
      0% { transform: scale(0.3); opacity: 0.1; }
      100% { transform: scale(1.5); opacity: 1; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px #a771ea); }
    }
  </style>

  <circle class="pulse-halo" cx="190" cy="200" r="110" />
  <circle class="pulse-halo" cx="190" cy="200" r="110" />

  <rect class="bit" x="45" y="75" width="12" height="12" fill="#a771ea" rx="3" style="animation-delay: 0s; transform-origin: 51px 81px;" />
  <rect class="bit" x="330" y="65" width="16" height="16" fill="#592ed1" rx="4" style="animation-delay: 0.3s; transform-origin: 338px 73px;" />
  <rect class="bit" x="85" y="325" width="18" height="18" fill="#592ed1" rx="5" style="animation-delay: 0.7s; transform-origin: 94px 334px;" />
  <rect class="bit" x="350" y="295" width="14" height="14" fill="#a771ea" rx="4" style="animation-delay: 0.5s; transform-origin: 357px 302px;" />

  <rect class="hand hand-l flicker" x="30" y="200" width="30" height="30" fill="#a771ea" rx="8" />
  <rect class="hand hand-r flicker" x="330" y="160" width="40" height="40" fill="#a771ea" rx="10" />

  <g class="robot">
    <path d="M 120 300 L 200 300 L 180 340 L 140 340 Z" fill="#592ed1" />
    <path d="M 120 300 L 200 300 L 180 340 L 140 340 Z" fill="#000" opacity="0.4" />
    
    <polygon class="flame" points="140,340 180,340 160,390" fill="#a771ea" />
    <polygon class="flame" points="150,340 170,340 160,370" fill="#fff" />

    <rect x="185" y="85" width="10" height="40" fill="#592ed1" />
    <rect x="185" y="85" width="10" height="40" fill="#000" opacity="0.2" />
    <rect class="fast-flicker" x="175" y="60" width="30" height="30" fill="#a771ea" rx="6" />

    <path d="M 80 140 L 140 90 L 300 90 L 240 140 Z" fill="#592ed1" />
    <path d="M 80 140 L 140 90 L 300 90 L 240 140 Z" fill="#fff" opacity="0.25" />
    
    <path d="M 240 140 L 300 90 L 300 250 L 240 300 Z" fill="#592ed1" />
    <path d="M 240 140 L 300 90 L 300 250 L 240 300 Z" fill="#000" opacity="0.3" />
    
    <path d="M 80 140 L 240 140 L 240 300 L 80 300 Z" fill="#592ed1" />
    
    <path class="flicker" d="M 80 140 L 140 90 L 300 90 L 300 250 L 240 300 L 80 300 Z" fill="none" stroke="#a771ea" stroke-width="5" stroke-linejoin="round" />
    <path d="M 240 140 L 300 90" stroke="#a771ea" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <path d="M 80 140 L 240 140 L 240 300" stroke="#a771ea" stroke-width="5" stroke-linejoin="round" fill="none" />

    <rect x="95" y="155" width="130" height="130" rx="15" fill="#a771ea" />
    <rect x="95" y="155" width="130" height="130" rx="15" fill="#000" opacity="0.1" />

    <g fill="#592ed1">
      <rect x="115" y="190" width="25" height="15" rx="5" />
      <rect class="wink" x="175" y="190" width="25" height="15" rx="5" />
      
      <rect x="130" y="240" width="60" height="14" rx="7" />
      <rect class="fast-flicker" x="138" y="243" width="8" height="8" rx="4" fill="#fff" />
      <rect class="fast-flicker" x="156" y="243" width="8" height="8" rx="4" fill="#fff" style="animation-delay: 0.1s" />
      <rect class="fast-flicker" x="174" y="243" width="8" height="8" rx="4" fill="#fff" style="animation-delay: 0.2s" />
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>

state.headline: Esprit Futur
state.body: Explorez l'avenir, créez votre nouvelle réalité digitale.

stickers.svgCode:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 400 400" width="400" height="400">
    <defs>
        <!-- Primary Heart Gradient -->
        <radialGradient id="heartGrad" cx="35%" cy="30%" r="75%">
            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#e8a87c" />
            <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#c4622a" />
            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7a3612" />
        </radialGradient>

        <!-- Ambient Glows -->
        <radialGradient id="glowGrad" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c4622a" stop-opacity="0.4" />
            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c4622a" stop-opacity="0" />
        </radialGradient>
        
        <radialGradient id="hoverGlowGrad" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#e8a87c" stop-opacity="0.6" />
            <stop offset="60%" stop-color="#c4622a" stop-opacity="0.2" />
            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e8a87c" stop-opacity="0" />
        </radialGradient>

        <radialGradient id="innerCoreGrad" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#e8a87c" stop-opacity="0.9" />
            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c4622a" stop-opacity="0.1" />
        </radialGradient>

        <!-- Reusable Heart Path (Optimized & Perfectly Symmetrical) -->
        <path id="heartShape" d="M200,330 C90,230 50,160 50,110 C50,60 90,30 135,30 C170,30 190,50 200,70 C210,50 230,30 265,30 C310,30 350,60 350,110 C350,160 310,230 200,330 Z" />

        <!-- Filters -->
        <filter id="blurShadow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
            <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="15" />
        </filter>
    </defs>

    <style>
        /* Base Scene */
        .scene {
            transform-origin: 200px 180px;
            transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
        }

        /* Hover Interactions */
        svg:hover .scene {
            transform: scale(1.05);
        }
        svg:hover .ambient {
            opacity: 0.2;
        }
        svg:hover .ambient-hover {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
        svg:hover .heart-group {
            animation-duration: 1.8s;
        }
        svg:hover .ripple {
            animation-duration: 1.8s;
            stroke: #e8a87c;
        }
        svg:hover .particle {
            animation-duration: 1.8s;
        }

        /* Ambient Layers */
        .ambient, .ambient-hover {
            transform-origin: 200px 180px;
            transition: all 0.8s ease;
        }
        .ambient-hover {
            opacity: 0;
        }

        /* Main Heart Animations */
        .heart-group {
            transform-origin: 200px 180px;
            animation: organic-pulse 2.4s infinite cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
        }

        @keyframes organic-pulse {
            0%   { transform: scale(1); }
            12%  { transform: scale(1.04); }     /* Lub */
            24%  { transform: scale(0.98); }     /* Relax */
            38%  { transform: scale(1.14); }     /* Dub */
            55%  { transform: scale(1.01); }     /* Exhale */
            75%  { transform: scale(0.99); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }

        /* Inner Core */
        .heart-inner {
            transform-origin: 200px 180px;
            animation: inner-pulse 2.4s infinite ease-in-out;
            mix-blend-mode: screen;
        }

        @keyframes inner-pulse {
            0%   { transform: scale(0.35); opacity: 0.5; }
            38%  { transform: scale(0.48); opacity: 0.9; }
            100% { transform: scale(0.35); opacity: 0.5; }
        }

        /* Ripple / Echo Effects */
        .ripple {
            fill: none;
            stroke: #c4622a;
            stroke-width: 2px;
            transform-origin: 200px 180px;
            animation: ripple-anim 2.4s infinite cubic-bezier(0.1, 0.6, 0.3, 1);
        }
        .r1 { animation-delay: 0s; }
        .r2 { animation-delay: 0.8s; }
        .r3 { animation-delay: 1.6s; }

        @keyframes ripple-anim {
            0%   { transform: scale(0.9); opacity: 0.6; stroke-width: 5px; }
            100% { transform: scale(1.6); opacity: 0; stroke-width: 1px; }
        }

        /* Highlight Layer */
        .highlight {
            fill: none;
            stroke: #e8a87c;
            stroke-width: 4px;
            stroke-linecap: round;
            opacity: 0.7;
        }

        /* Particle Flow System */
        .particle {
            fill: #e8a87c;
            opacity: 0;
            transform-origin: 200px 180px;
            animation: flow-out 2.4s infinite cubic-bezier(0.1, 0.8, 0.3, 1);
        }
        
        .p1 { animation-delay: 0.80s; }
        .p2 { animation-delay: 0.85s; }
        .p3 { animation-delay: 0.90s; }
        .p4 { animation-delay: 0.95s; }
        .p5 { animation-delay: 1.00s; }
        .p6 { animation-delay: 1.05s; }
        .p7 { animation-delay: 1.10s; }
        .p8 { animation-delay: 1.15s; }

        @keyframes flow-out {
            0%   { transform: translateY(0px) scale(0.2); opacity: 0; }
            20%  { opacity: 0.8; }
            100% { transform: translateY(-70px) scale(1.2); opacity: 0; }
        }
    </style>

    <!-- Invisible trigger area for whole-SVG hover interaction -->
    <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="transparent" pointer-events="all" />

    <g class="scene">
        <!-- Ambient Background Glows -->
        <circle cx="200" cy="180" r="170" fill="url(#glowGrad)" class="ambient" />
        <circle cx="200" cy="180" r="190" fill="url(#hoverGlowGrad)" class="ambient-hover" />

        <!-- Rippling Echoes -->
        <g class="ripples">
            <use href="#heartShape" class="ripple r1" />
            <use href="#heartShape" class="ripple r2" />
            <use href="#heartShape" class="ripple r3" />
        </g>

        <!-- Main Beating Heart Group -->
        <g class="heart-group">
            <!-- Blurred Drop Shadow -->
            <use href="#heartShape" fill="#c4622a" opacity="0.5" filter="url(#blurShadow)" />
            
            <!-- Core 3D Heart -->
            <use href="#heartShape" fill="url(#heartGrad)" />
            
            <!-- Elegant Top-Left Highlight -->
            <path d="M 85 105 C 85 70 115 45 145 45" class="highlight" />
        </g>

        <!-- Translucent Breathing Inner Heart -->
        <use href="#heartShape" fill="url(#innerCoreGrad)" class="heart-inner" pointer-events="none" />

        <!-- Radiating Organic Particles -->
        <g class="particles">
            <g style="transform-origin: 200px 180px; transform: rotate(0deg);"><circle cx="200" cy="90" r="4.5" class="particle p1"/></g>
            <g style="transform-origin: 200px 180px; transform: rotate(45deg);"><circle cx="200" cy="90" r="3" class="particle p2"/></g>
            <g style="transform-origin: 200px 180px; transform: rotate(90deg);"><circle cx="200" cy="90" r="5" class="particle p3"/></g>
            <g style="transform-origin: 200px 180px; transform: rotate(135deg);"><circle cx="200" cy="90" r="2.5" class="particle p4"/></g>
            <g style="transform-origin: 200px 180px; transform: rotate(180deg);"><circle cx="200" cy="90" r="4" class="particle p5"/></g>
            <g style="transform-origin: 200px 180px; transform: rotate(225deg);"><circle cx="200" cy="90" r="3.5" class="particle p6"/></g>
            <g style="transform-origin: 200px 180px; transform: rotate(270deg);"><circle cx="200" cy="90" r="5" class="particle p7"/></g>
            <g style="transform-origin: 200px 180px; transform: rotate(315deg);"><circle cx="200" cy="90" r="3" class="particle p8"/></g>
        </g>
    </g>
</svg>

state.headline: Marseille en bleu
state.body: Optimisez vos processus avec l'intelligence artificielle. Gagnez du temps et de l'efficacité pour vous concentrer sur l'essentiel de votre activité.
